these factors. Maha Yogas are: Panella Maha Purvsha Yogas viz. Hamsa.
Maalavya. Bhadra.. Ruchaka and Sasa. Sthirlt Lakshmi Yoga. Chatussara
Yoga. Parijata Yoga. Adhi Yoga, Pushkalaa Yoga. Siva Yoga, Vrshnu Yoga.
Saarva bhowma Yoga, Chakravarti Yoga, Utkrishta Raja Yoga. Maha Bhagya
Yoga, Sree Yoga, Kalaanidhi Yoga, Aiswarya Yoga, Ayanta Ohyanalabha
Yoga, Shubhra Yoga, Gajakesari Yoga, Raja Yoga and others. There are
in all 3016 Yogas in vogue including Nabhasa Yogas. Auk:rui Yogas.
Ashubha Yogas, Ouryogas and Ava Yogas.
AdhiYoga
When I had just passed my B.A. honours examination my father
took me with him to an astrologer, familiarly known as Singapore Jo tiShar.
He was a real Tejaswi. in the traditional way putting on kumkum matk
on his forehead but he used to chew paan and tobacco frequently. My
